notes: Silhouette roughly tracks the photo's mantle and right-side arms but omits the two long looping tentacles arcing back across the body, and the linework is jagged with random noise stipple rather than confident FAO-plate ink.
specific_issues: missing the two long feeding tentacles that loop up-left and down-left across the mantle in the photo
fin/mantle outline is lumpy and wobbly rather than a clean continuous curve
stipple is random scatter, not concentrated in chromatophore fields visible on the photo
no ring-shaped suckers indicated along the arms
eye is a small dot but lacks the almond outline characteristic of FAO plates
small detached island marks inside the body read as photo-trace clutter
arms terminate in ragged blobby shapes instead of tapered tips with suckers
overall reads as a rough auto-trace, not a scientific plate
